prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程和211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科依托学校强大的综合平台和科研实力， 临床医学、口腔医学等专业享有较高声誉，对优质生源具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。武汉大学地处华中中心城市武汉，医疗资源丰富，区位优势明显。四川省医学类招生 规模适中，2026年扩招后总计划34人，虽较去年大幅增加，但相对于全省考生规模仍属有限名额，预计竞争依然较为激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年武汉大学在四川医学类最低录取位次约为7196名，波动区间为6696至7696名。2026年大幅扩招使位次较2025年显著下降（位次数 字增大），但医学持续高热度和武汉大学品牌效应使实际位次下降幅度小于纯公式计算结果，整体呈现扩招带动门槛降低的趋势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest admission ranking for Medicine at Wuhan University in Sichuan was 4076 (planned enrollment 18). In 2023, the ranking rose to 3348 (planned enrollment 24). In 2024, it further rose to 3150 (planned enrollment 39). Over three years, the ranking continuously increased, reflecting the growing popularity of medical applications year by year. In 2025, due to a significant reduction in enrollment plan to 11, the ranking fell back to 3413. In 2026, the plan expands to 34, an increase of 23 compared to 2025, an increase of about 209%. The substantial expansion will significantly lower the admission threshold, and the ranking number is expected to increase noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Its comprehensive strength ranks among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines rely on the university's strong comprehensive platform and scientific research strength. Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other majors enjoy a high reputation and have a sustained attraction for high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national application popularity for medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being particularly competitive. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with rich medical resources and obvious regional advantages. The enrollment scale for Medicine in Sichuan Province is moderate. After the expansion in 2026, the total plan is 34, which, although significantly increased compared to last year, is still a limited number relative to the province's total examinee population. Competition is expected to remain relatively intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted lowest admission ranking for Medicine at Wuhan University in Sichuan in 2026 is approximately 7196, with a fluctuation range of 6696 to 7696. The significant expansion in 2026 causes the ranking to drop notably compared to 2025 (ranking number increases), but the sustained high popularity of Medicine and the brand effect of Wuhan University make the actual ranking drop smaller than the pure formula calculation result, overall showing a trend of lowering the threshold driven by expansion.
